postReview.title: France 2-0 Belgium: Dembele leads Les Bleus back to winning ways
postReview.description: With Kylian Mbappe on the bench, Ousmane Dembele took centre stage to get France's first victory of their Nations League campaign.

preReview.title: Tedesco 'still hurt' by France defeat at Euro 2024
preReview.description: Belgium were knocked out of Euro 2024 by France, and Domenico Tedesco is looking for a more positive result in the Nations League.
